class.name: CrowdControlEffect
class.brief_description: Represents an individual interactivity effect in the CrowdControl system.
class.description: [CrowdControlEffect] defines a single effect that a viewer can trigger in your game, such as giving coins, changing player color, or dealing damage.

method.name: to_json
method.description: Serializes this [CrowdControlEffect] into a JSON-compatible dictionary for sending to the CrowdControl API.

members.member: List of categories this effect belongs to.
Duration of the effect in milliseconds. A value of 0 usually indicates an instant effect with no lasting duration.
List of groups this effect belongs to.
Whether the effect is currently inactive.
Additional notes or internal comments about the effect.
Dictionary of configurable parameters for the effect.
Cost required to trigger the effect. Typically expressed in platform-specific currency (e.g., points, coins).
Maximum quantity that can be applied in a single trigger.
Minimum quantity required to trigger the effect.
